text:
- Update to 1.1.5

Trivial update, lightly tested but seems to work.

Fixes this bug with newer perl (among others):
http://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=722206

Port maintainer (johans@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
